Draw a card from the specified deck

Sends the available token colors to the client.

Retrieves the list of available games and sends it to the client.

Notifies the GameController that a heartbeat message has been received.

Process the client's request to join an existing game.

Executes the objective card chosen message on the specified controller.
execute(Controller) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ClientToServer.PickMessage
Handle the player's pick of a displayed playable card.
execute(Controller) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ClientToServer.PlayCardMessage
Handle the player's request to play a card.

Sending the chat message to the appropriate chat.

Handle the color choice for the specified player.
execute(Controller) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ClientToServerMessage
Executes the action associated with this message on the given controller.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.ColorAvailableMessage
Notifies client regarding the available player colors.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.ColorChosenMessage
Notify every player regarding the color chosen.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.CoordinatesAvailableMessage
Updates the client's virtual view with the available coordinates.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.CurrentPlayerHasPlayedMessage
Notifies the view about if the current player has played.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.CurrentPlayerMessage
Notifies the view about the current player.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.DisplayedObjectiveMessage
Updates the client's virtual view with the displayed objective cards.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.DisplayedPlayableCardsMessage
Updates the client's virtual view with the displayed playable cards.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.ExceptionMessage
Notifies the client's view about the exception.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.FirstMessage
Sets the client's ID and notifies the view to display the first message.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.GameJoinedMessage
Sets the client's virtual view state to WAITING_FOR_PLAYERS, and notifies the view that the game has been joined.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.GameStateMessage
Notifies the client's view about the updated game state
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.GoldDeckMessage
Sets the golden deck in the client's virtual view.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.GridMessage
Sets the grid data for the specified player in the client's virtual view.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.HandCardsMessage
Sets the hand cards for the client's virtual view.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.HandObjectiveMessage
Sets the objective cards in the player's hand for the client's virtual view.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.PlayersListMessage
Sets the list of player nicknames in the client's virtual view.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.RecieveChatMessage
Creates a ChatMessage object and adds it to either the global chat or private chat in the client's virtual view based on the recipient.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.ResourceDeckMessage
Sets the resource deck in the client's virtual view.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.ResourcesMessage
Sets the updated resources for the specified player in the client's virtual view.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.ScoreMessage
Sets the updated scores in the client's virtual view.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.SendGameListMessage
Displays the received game list in the client's view.
execute(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.WinnerMessage
Sets the winner in the client's virtual view
